name: humanspec_FAM72_dup_gibbon
description: Human-specific duplicon contrast: FAM72_dup. Status in Nomascus leucogenys: 'human_specific_expansion'. In human (GRCh38) the locus sits on chr1:~120.7 Mb; in this ape the syntenic region is approximated on chr1. Used by LLmap to refuse silent absorption of human-vs-ape divergence when mapping cross-species reads.

architecture.internal_structure: Reference contrast for FAM72_dup. See Dennis 2012, Suntsova 2017, T2T-ape 2024 for duplicon-by-duplicon presence calls.

related_diseases: human-specific cortex expansion / neurodevelopmental dosage (e.g. FAM72_dup)
